fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the warehouse shipment line.

fields.name: Source Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the table that is the source of the receipt line.

fields.name: Source Subtype
fields.tooltip: Specifies the source subtype of the document to which the line relates.

fields.name: Source No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the source document that the entry originates from.

fields.name: Source Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line number of the source document that the entry originates from.

fields.name: Source Document
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of document that the line relates to.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the location from which the items on the line are being shipped.

fields.name: Shelf No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shelf number of the item for informational use.

fields.name: Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the bin in which the items will be placed before shipment.

fields.name: Zone Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the zone where the bin on this shipment line is located.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item that should be shipped.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that should be shipped.

fields.name: Qty. (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that should be shipped, in the base unit of measure.

fields.name: Qty. Outstanding
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that still needs to be handled.

fields.name: Qty. Outstanding (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that still needs to be handled, expressed in the base unit of measure.

fields.name: Qty. to Ship
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of items that remain to be shipped.

fields.name: Qty. to Ship (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity, in base units of measure, that will be shipped when the warehouse shipment is posted.

fields.name: Qty. Picked
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many of the total shipment quantity have been registered as picked.

fields.name: Qty. Picked (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many of the total shipment quantity in the base unit of measure have been registered as picked.

fields.name: Qty. Shipped
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the item on the line that is posted as shipped.

fields.name: Qty. Shipped (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that is posted as shipped expressed in the base unit of measure.

fields.name: Pick Qty.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity in pick instructions assigned to be picked for the warehouse shipment line.

fields.name: Pick Qty. (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity, in the base unit of measure, in pick instructions, that is assigned to be picked for the warehouse shipment line.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Qty. per Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of base units of measure that are in the unit of measure specified for the item on the line.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the item in the line.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies a second description of the item in the line, if any.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of the shipment line.

fields.name: Sorting Sequence No.
fields.tooltip: Determines the order in which the shipment lines will appear. The program uses the field internally.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the related warehouse activity, such as a pick, must be completed to ensure items can be shipped by the shipment date.

fields.name: Destination Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of destination associated with the warehouse shipment line.

fields.name: Destination No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer, vendor, or location to which the items should be shipped.

fields.name: Cubage
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cubage of the items on the line, calculated as quantity. Outstanding x Item Unit of Measure Cubage.

fields.name: Weight
fields.tooltip: Specifies the weight of the items on the line, calculated as Qty. Outstanding x Item Unit of Measure Weight.

fields.name: Shipping Advice
fields.tooltip:
Contains the shipping advice for the warehouse shipment line.
The value is copied from the source document line.
The following options exist:
Partial

Complete

fields.name: Shipment Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies when items on the document are shipped or were shipped. A shipment date is usually calculated from a requested delivery date plus lead time.

fields.name: Completely Picked
fields.tooltip: Indicates whether the shipment is completely picked. The program fills in this field.

fields.name: Not upd. by Src. Doc. Post.
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally.

fields.name: Posting from Whse. Ref.
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally.

fields.name: Assemble to Order
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the warehouse shipment line is for items that are assembled to a sales order before it is shipped.
